description.p: Operator-side controller for SAINT.OS robots. Connects to a robot's onboard server over WebSocket, surfaces detected peripherals, and maps gamepad / Steam Deck inputs to motor and effector commands.

Auto-discovers SAINT.OS instances on the local network via mDNS, so the operator doesn't have to type a hostname or IP. Works on the Steam Deck's gamepad inputs (including gyro), with binding profiles persisted between sessions.
Initial Flatpak release. Includes mDNS auto-discovery, gamepad binding profiles, gyro input, peripheral telemetry, and emergency-stop integration.
